title: Tunisian Frittata
description: A keto twist on the classic Italian omelette, incorporating Tunisian flavors and ingredients.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, tunisian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a 9-inch (23cm) oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
Add the diced frittata and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Pour the egg mixture over the frittata and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with feta cheese and parsley.
Return to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
